title: Charred Spanish Tortilla Española
description: A Mexican twist on the classic Spanish omelette, featuring charred onions and spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced Spanish onions and cook until caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Add the charred onions to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the cooked onion mixture, cumin, chili powder, and garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the tortilla espanola and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Pour the egg mixture over the tortilla espanola.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the tortilla espanola.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are almost set.
Use the spatula to carefully fold the tortilla espanola in half.
Cook for an additional minute, until the eggs are fully set.
